criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Number of times the app has been downloaded.

criteria.name: Monthly Active Users
criteria.description: Number of users actively using the app on a monthly basis.

criteria.name: AI Functionality
criteria.description: The breadth and depth of AI features offered by the app.

criteria.name: User Reviews and Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating and number of reviews by users.

criteria.name: Versatility
criteria.description: The range of tasks the app can perform.
